broadcast.description: TV and radio news outlets - reduce dominance in feed

print.description: Newspapers and print-first publications - preferred sources

preferred_local.description: Subscribed local paper - always wins dedup over other local outlets and gets the highest score boost

maker_gadget.description: Maker/repair/gadget outlets - small boost so they clear general quality thresholds for the Wednesday gear/gadgets theme

personal_listicle.description: High-volume first-person 'I tried/ditched/switched' outlets - cap dominance and dock score for thin personal-anecdote listicles

prescore_keyword_filter.description: Free pre-scoring gate: articles from these high-volume aggregator sources must match a CATEGORY_RULES interest keyword and are capped per source before reaching Claude/Cohere scoring.

discovery_prescore_filter.description: Feed discovery gate for high-volume OPML sources: per run, only this many not-yet-cached candidate feeds are evaluated (remaining candidates trickle in on later runs), and a candidate is skipped without an LLM call if none of its sampled articles match a CATEGORY_RULES interest keyword.

subscriber_access.description: Sources where the user has subscription access (direct subscription or Apple News+) that bypasses the paywall. Used to skip the paywall scoring penalty and tag matching articles in the output feed.
